summary: Iteration 15: Verified Infographic Minimal-Text feature. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='infographic' returns exactly 6 sections with 2 bullets max per section (under 10 words each), subtitles, stats/statLabels, workflowSteps for workflow sections, and imageKeywords. visualType distribution shows 3 workflow + 2 stat + 1 none (not all 'none'). Frontend Export button (data-testid='output-export-btn') triggers renderInfographicWithImages function (line 1417). All 13 backend pytest tests passed.

issues: Previously generated infographics stored in DB still show old format with 3-4 bullets per section. New generations follow minimal-text format correctly.

passed_tests: 1. Backend API health check - returns 200
2. Backend GET /api/sources - 3 indexed sources available
3. Backend POST /api/generate with output_type='infographic' returns 200
4. Backend: Infographic has exactly 6 sections (requirement met)
5. Backend: All sections have max 2 bullets (requirement met)
6. Backend: All bullets under 10 words (4-5 words each)
7. Backend: All sections have subtitles
8. Backend: All sections have imageKeyword for AI image generation
9. Backend: visualType distribution: 3 workflow + 2 stat + 1 none (not all 'none')
10. Backend: At least 2 workflow sections present (found 3)
11. Backend: Workflow sections have workflowSteps arrays with 4-5 steps each
12. Backend: Stat sections have stat values and labels
13. Backend: Structure summary test passed
14. Frontend: App loads correctly at https://ai-insight-canvas.preview.emergentagent.com
15. Frontend: Studio panel shows Infographic tool with 'Visual data summary' description
16. Frontend: Infographic tool generates new output when clicked
17. Frontend: Infographic modal displays 6 sections with structured content
18. Frontend: Export button visible with data-testid='output-export-btn'
19. Frontend: Export button clickable and initiates export process
20. Frontend: renderInfographicWithImages imported in NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 4)
21. Frontend: downloadOutput function calls renderInfographicWithImages for infographic type (line 1415-1418)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (line 938-1074): generate_infographic() correctly implements minimal-text prompt with 6 sections, 2 bullets max, visualType distribution, workflowSteps, and imageKeyword requirements
server.py (line 1007): Hard cap enforced: section['bullets'] = section['bullets'][:2]
server.py (line 956-962): visualType options documented as 'workflow', 'stat', or 'none' with required distribution
infographicRenderer.js (line 38-370): renderInfographicWithImages generates AI images, renders canvas with large images (260px), workflow diagrams, stat cards
infographicRenderer.js (line 43): Image generation limited to 6 sections: toGenerate = sections.filter(s => !s.sectionImage).slice(0, 6)
NotebookLM_Workspace.jsx (line 1415-1418): Export triggers renderInfographicWithImages for infographic type outputs
seed_data_creation: Used existing indexed sources: SOW-H@H, H@H Phased Scope, Slide Deck
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infographic minimal-text feature fully verified. Backend returns exactly 6 sections with 2 bullets max each (4-5 words typical), visualType='workflow' or 'stat' (not all 'none'), workflowSteps for workflow sections, and imageKeyword for each section. Frontend Export button calls renderInfographicWithImages which generates AI images for 6 sections and renders canvas as PNG with large images (260px), workflow step diagrams, and stat highlight cards. The existing infographics in DB may have old format (3-4 bullets); newly generated infographics follow the new minimal-text structure.

verified_requirements.2_bullets_max_per_section: VERIFIED - All sections have max 2 bullets
verified_requirements.bullets_under_10_words: VERIFIED - All bullets are 4-6 words (well under limit)
verified_requirements.imageKeyword_per_section: VERIFIED - All sections have specific imageKeywords
verified_requirements.visualType_workflow_or_stat: VERIFIED - Distribution: 3 workflow, 2 stat, 1 none (not all 'none')
verified_requirements.at_least_2_workflow_sections: VERIFIED - Found 3 workflow sections with workflowSteps
verified_requirements.workflowSteps_for_workflow: VERIFIED - Workflow sections have 4-5 step arrays
verified_requirements.stat_values_present: VERIFIED - Stat sections have stat values (e.g., '40+', '5', '4') with labels
verified_requirements.export_triggers_renderInfographicWithIma: VERIFIED - downloadOutput calls renderInfographicWithImages for type='infographic'
